full_text: Ben Shikongo to Rajapaksa, no run, Ben Shikongo almost got the hat-trick. Full and moving back in, Rajapaksa beaten on the flick shot, impact right in line with leg stump but the angle from over the wicket meant it just pitched outside leg. Good call from the ump. Gee, what a start this is from Namibia. This is what we are all here for in ICC comps

full_text: Ben Shikongo to Gunathilaka, Caught by Zane Green!! Edged and gone first ball. Sri Lanka 21/3, well, well! Simple good length delivery, but simple things do wonder when there is some help from the pitch. Gunathilaka pokes at this away from the body without moving his feet, the ball nips away with the extra angle across the left-hander, clear outside edge to the keeper.
